# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# take backpack Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions.
#   Taken.
> take backpack
# take map Taken.
> take map
# Store the map in the backpack
# put map in backpack You put zoo map in backpack.
> put map in backpack
# look in backpack In backpack you see: zoo map.
> look in backpack
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# take penny Taken.
> take penny
# put penny on bench You put souvenir penny on park bench.
> put penny on bench
# examine bench A sturdy park bench painted forest green. On park bench you
#   see souvenir penny.
> examine bench
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# take dispenser feed dispenser is fixed in place. *DING DONG* "Attention
#   visitors! Two hours until closing.
> take dispenser
# examine dispenser A coin-operated feed dispenser mounted on a wooden post.
> examine dispenser
